title: Image location don't respect Column width
author: yuvpf

comments.author: Siemienik
ShraddhaJ11
comments.body: Hi @Siemienik  Still facing image alignment issue with custom column width.

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: hmm.. it works for me really well, which version have you?

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body:
> hmm.. it works for me really well, which version have you?

I am using 4.0.1. How you are calculating colOff and rowOff?

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: it's enough to specify `col` and `row` values. collOff and rowOff will be calculated during saving

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body:
Thanks for the response @Siemienik . 
I am facing a issue when I am trying to align image to the right of a particular cell with custom column width i.e. if we change the column width to some other width and try to right align image in a cell of that column using col and row coordinate then image is not displaying in the right.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/31271406/84943794-83f2cd80-b102-11ea-9075-cc8c14ea8054.png)

In the above image I want cross image same as tick image in size and cross image should right align within the cell. Did you have any solution for this ?

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: after that you changed column width, are `col` and `row` properties has the same value as before?

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body: First I am reading a excel file and then I am only adding the image on a particular cell. If width of the column for that cell is default column width then image alignment is working fine using col and row but If the excel file that I am reading, have custom column width then adding image to a cell that has custom width , in that right image alignment is not working.

comments.author: yulduck
comments.body: Is there any workaround for this bug at the moment?

comments.author: rsl081
comments.body:
Good day guys, 

I'm also facing the same problem. The version that I already trying is the latest 4.3.0 and this one 4.2.1.
When adding an image using coordinate (70% column), the image doesn't respect my custom width.

is there any workaround for this bug?
